title: Fixed the problem of not calling abc correctly when using libyosys.so
body:
Fixed the problem of not calling abc correctly when using libyosys.so library (it will try to call yosys-abc as command line instead of calling abc::Abc_RealMain)

_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_
I tried to use libyosys.so and execute the abc instruction, which resulted in an unexpected error. Yosys tried to execute the yosys-abc program.

_Explain how this is achieved._
Simply add a check and append new switch options to ABCMKARGS.

_If applicable, please suggest to reviewers how they can test the change._
Try to compile and generate libyosys.so and connect it, then use the C++ interface to call run_pass and execute abc related instructions.
